trickyParts: Race condition in test mock: sseWriter/sseConn were set AFTER writing the endpoint event, but the client reads the event and immediately POSTs to /message. On slow CI, sendSSE() found nil fields and silently dropped the initialize response, causing a 30s timeout.
deviations: Fix is in test mock only (not production code) — the race was in the test helper, not the HTTPServer implementation
